summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Plans Management and Plan-based Feature Gating. All 30 backend tests pass (100%). All 12 requested frontend features verified via Playwright. Full E2E flow tested: Admin creates plans → Wallet shows dynamic plans → GigBoard shows upgrade wall for unsubscribed users.

design_issues.screen: Admin Plans page — New Plan button
issues: Button text truncates to '+ New' on 1920px viewport at top-right corner (not a real bug, just visual observation)

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: In AdminPlans.jsx handleToggleActive (line 304-309), the PUT request only sends {is_active: !plan.is_active}. This is fine per UpdatePlanRequest (all fields optional), but no error handling if plan is not found — toast.error('Failed to update') is generic. Consider passing the error detail from backend.

MINOR: In plans.py _clean helper (line 48-52), when _id is already a str (UUID), it works correctly. But if somehow an ObjectId were stored, this would fail since str(ObjectId) != UUID. The current implementation always stores plan_id as str(uuid.uuid4()) so this is safe.

INFO: GigBoard fetchBrowse useCallback includes 'filters' in dependency array but the useEffect only triggers on 'tab' change (line 771), not on filter changes. Users must click 'Search' button to apply filters — this is intentional UX, not a bug.
INFO: Wallet.jsx subscribe handler uses plan.id but backend wallet.py subscribe endpoint expects plan_id. Verify wallet.py matches this field name for seamless subscription flow.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test plans during UI testing: 'Base Legacy Plan' (₹99, legacy_tier=base, gig OFF) and 'Pro Gig Plan' (₹299, gig ON). These persist in DB after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plans feature fully tested and working. Key info: (1) Admin login is at / (root redirects to /admin/dashboard after login). (2) Plans start empty - admin must create them. (3) Backend token key is 'token' not 'access_token'. (4) Auth endpoint for user profile is /api/auth/me not /api/users/me. (5) 2 test plans exist in DB: 'Base Legacy Plan' (base legacy) and 'Pro Gig Plan' (gig enabled). (6) lead_test@test.com has no active plan - will see upgrade wall on GigBoard. (7) MOCKED: WhatsApp notifications, Email (Resend), Google Calendar.

flows_verified.admin_plans_empty_state: PASS: Empty state 'No plans yet' shown with stats all 0
flows_verified.create_plan_dialog: PASS: New Plan button opens dialog, all fields work (name, price, features toggles, legacy_tier select, active toggle)
flows_verified.create_plan_success: PASS: Success toast 'Plan created!', plan appears in list with feature badges
flows_verified.plan_feature_badges: PASS: 'Gig Board ON/OFF' and 'WhatsApp ON/OFF' badges shown correctly per config
flows_verified.edit_plan: PASS: Edit button opens pre-filled dialog, Save Changes works, 'Plan updated!' toast
flows_verified.toggle_active_inactive: PASS: Toggle shows 'Plan deactivated'/'Plan activated' toast, stats update, Inactive badge appears
flows_verified.legacy_tier_migrate_button: PASS: Plans with legacy_tier show 'maps → base' badge and Migrate button
flows_verified.migrate_button: PASS: Migrate button triggers migration, shows 'Migrated X user(s) from base to plan' toast
flows_verified.delete_plan_0_users: PASS: Delete dialog opens, delete button enabled for 0-user plans, 'Plan deleted' toast
flows_verified.public_get_plans: PASS: GET /api/plans returns only active plans without auth
flows_verified.wallet_dynamic_plans: PASS: Wallet page loads plans from DB API (not hardcoded), shows 2 plans with subscribe buttons
flows_verified.gig_board_upgrade_wall: PASS: User without gig plan sees upgrade wall with 'Gig Board Access Required' and 'View Plans & Upgrade' CTA
flows_verified.post_gig_blocked: PASS: Post Gig button shows 'Upgrade your plan to post gigs' toast for users without access
flows_verified.plan_count_stats: PASS: Stats row (Total Plans, Active, Subscribers) updates correctly after CRUD operations

mocked_integrations: WhatsApp notifications, Email (Resend), Google Calendar OAuth are MOCKED
